items.title: Squirrel Hunting - Kentucky Department of Fish & Wildlife
items.description: In Kentucky, there are two seasons. A Spring Season that is mid-May through mid-June and a Fall Season that is mid-August through the end of February.

items.description: Open Season: June 15 through September 30.

items.title: Squirrel Season | Outdoor Alabama
items.description: September 13 - March 1. 8 a day - 8 in possession.

items.title: Georgia Squirrel Hunting Season Begins Aug. 15
items.description: Aug 7, 2025 - Squirrel season is Aug. 15, 2025 - Feb. 28, 2026, and hunters can pursue both gray and fox squirrels. The maximum daily bag limit is 12 per day.

items.description: Season Dates & County Regulations. General Season. East Texas: Oct. 1, 2025.

items.title: Small Game Hunting Regulations and Seasons
items.description: Season Dates. October 25 through February 14: west of I-95. Continuous closed season: east of I-95. Bag Limit. Three per day.

items.title: Squirrel: Hunting | Missouri Department of Conservation
items.description: With a small game hunting permit you may take groundhogs, squirrels, and rabbits with a cage-type trap during that species open hunting season.

items.title: Maryland Small Game Seasons Provide Abundant Fall Hunting Opportunities
items.description: Oct 6, 2025 - Squirrel season opened September 6 with a bag limit of six per day.

items.description: Jul 28, 2023 - Squirrel season is one of if not the longest of the Oklahoma hunting seasons. Beginning May 15, and running through Feb. 28.

items.title: Florida Gray Squirrel and Rabbit Hunting
items.description: Many of these WMAs offer a small game hunting season where quota permits are not required.

items.title: Squirrel Season Dates and Bag Limits - Arkansas
items.description: 2025-26 Squirrel Season - Squirrels may not be hunted with rifles or handguns larger than .22 caliber rimfire.

items.title: Squirrel season - Missouri Dept. of Conservation
items.description: Squirrel season runs May 24 through Feb. 15, 2026.
